name: Proton Mail

pricing.details: Free tier: 1 address, 500MB storage. Paid plans from $3.99/month with custom domains and more storage.

description: End-to-end encrypted email service hosted in Switzerland under Swiss privacy law. Web client is open source. Supports PGP interoperability with external contacts.
rationale: Proton Mail encrypts message content and attachments end-to-end between Proton users. Subject lines and metadata are not E2E encrypted. The Swiss legal framework provides stronger protections than EU/US equivalents for account data. IP address logging has occurred in response to legal orders, which is a documented limitation. Free tier is functional. Client applications are open source and have been audited.
